BagM Beih. 02, 114 [letter?][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

o 2'2'

[...] x x x-⸢šu₂?⸣ ap-qid um-ma [...]

o 3'3'

[i]-⸢na⸣ muḫ-ḫi ša₂ DUMU ša₂ mḫe-ru-ṭu-su

concerning what the son of Heruṭusu,

o 4'4'

⸢A⸣ ša₂ mzu-ʾi-lu-su₂? 2? [...]

descendant of Zuʾilusu ... [...]

o 5'5'

[...] x-ut-tu₄ ⸢EN⸣ muḫ-ḫi [...]

[...] ... until [...]

o 6'6'

⸢a?⸣-ga-a x x [...]

this ... [...]

r 1r 1

we will receive and raise [...]
